CustomField.description: Determines the rules for automatic Household object creation. Valid values include "All New Contacts," "All Individual Contacts," and "No Contacts." Only applies to the legacy One-to-One and Individual Account models; this setting is ignored when using the Household Account model, which manages Household membership through Account relationships.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Controls which Contacts get automatic Household objects. Only applies to One-to-One or Individual Account models; ignored for Household Account model.
CustomField.label: Household Object Rules
